title: Realm Interaction — how an aura modifies each realm's power
note_global: Expressions use 'a' = the aura rating. The modifier applies to Casting/Lab Totals, supernatural-ability rolls, Penetration, and Magic Resistance worked in that aura. A power FOREIGN to the aura also rolls +1 botch die per point of aura (doubled inside a regio). The Divine is never penalised anywhere.

Magic.note: Magic and Faerie are friendly (+½ each way); Magic boosts Hermetic casting.

Faerie.note: Faerie auras run high; +½ aura to Hermetic casting.

Divine.note: The Dominion crushes all non-Divine power; a magus's Gift flickers as a flame in wind.

Infernal.note: Infernal auras hamper Hermetic and (doubly) Faerie power.
